# CAT

> A secure, efficient, and easily extensible self-hosted Computer-Assisted Translation web application.

## Project Info

- Tech stack: TypeScript, Vue 3, Hono, Drizzle ORM, PostgreSQL
- License: GPL-3.0-only (main app), MIT (packages/plugins)

## Package Documentation

- [@cat/domain](./packages/domain.md): 242 exported functions — Domain layer: CQRS Commands and Queries, core business logic
- [@cat/operations](./packages/operations.md): 46 exported functions — Operations layer: business workflows composing domain operations
- [@cat/shared](./packages/shared.md): 23 exported functions — Shared Zod schemas, type definitions, and utility functions
- [@cat/db](./packages/db.md): 8 exported functions — Database layer: Drizzle ORM schemas and Redis client
- [@cat/permissions](./packages/permissions.md): 9 exported functions — Permission system: ReBAC-based access control
- [@cat/agent](./packages/agent.md): 56 exported functions — Agent and Workflow graph executor
- [@cat/server-shared](./packages/server-shared.md): 18 exported functions — Shared server utilities
- [@cat/plugin-core](./packages/plugin-core.md): 15 exported functions — Plugin system core: service registry, component registry, discovery

## @cat/domain

Domain layer using CQRS pattern. Commands mutate state, Queries read data.

- Commands: 87
- Queries: 141

## @cat/operations

Operations layer composing domain operations. Functions use `Op` suffix with Zod schema input validation.
